name: Akarsha Reddy ChiripiReddy
title: Senior DevOps Engineer
summary: Senior DevOps Engineer with 5+ years of experience specialising in cloud infrastructure, automation pipelines, Kubernetes orchestration, and site reliability engineering. Currently working at Bosch Digital, Bangalore. Expert in designing scalable, highly-available systems achieving 99.9% uptime SLA.

highlights: Automated 500+ deployments reducing manual effort by 80%
Achieved zero-downtime migrations for critical production systems
Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 40% through right-sizing and spot instances
Designed and maintained multi-cloud Kubernetes clusters serving enterprise applications
Built GitOps workflows with ArgoCD for 20+ microservices
Worked on CI/CD pipeline automation using Jenkins and GitLab CI
Supported Kubernetes deployments on AWS EKS
Implemented infrastructure as code using Terraform
Started career as QA Engineer then transitioned to DevOps
Automated test pipelines with Selenium and Jenkins

projects.name: Multi-Cloud Kubernetes Platform
projects.description: Designed a unified Kubernetes platform spanning AWS, Azure and GCP for enterprise workloads with auto-scaling and self-healing capabilities.

projects.name: Zero-Downtime Migration Framework
projects.description: Built a framework for blue-green and canary deployments enabling production service migrations without downtime.

projects.name: Observability Platform
projects.description: Implemented full-stack observability using Prometheus, Grafana dashboards and ELK stack for 30+ microservices.

projects.name: GitOps CI/CD Pipeline
projects.description: Designed a GitOps-based delivery system with ArgoCD, automated image promotion and rollback capabilities for 20+ services.

achievements: 500+ automated deployments with zero production incidents
99.9% uptime SLA maintained across all managed services
40% cost reduction achieved through cloud optimization
Led a 4-person DevOps team at Bosch Digital
Open source contributions to Helm charts and Terraform modules
